chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.S-287 of 2020. 1. For Orders on CMA No. 7313/2020. 2. For Orders on office objection. 3. For Orders on CMA No. 7314/2020. 4. For hearing of main case. 28-12-2020. Mr. Abdul Sattar Brohi advocate for the petitioner. >>>>>...<<<<< 1. Application for urgent hearing is granted. 2. Over ruled. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. The petitioners have sought for protection from harassment of the respondents. The perusal of record reveals that the protection which the petitioner have sought for from this Court has already been ordered in their favour by learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace/Sessions Judge Ghotki vide order dated 21-11-2020. No further order in that respect is called for by this Court by way of instant petition, same being misconceived is dismissed. Judge Nasim/P.A
